Ntc Off Motion For A Protective Order And For Imposition Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ELLEN WEDEMEYER'S Motion For A Protective Order And For Imposition Of Sanctions is off calendar because the moving party withdrew it on September 21, 2012. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
